blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,585 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 21.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 38" over the past week. Current depth: 68".
